title: fagara minutiflora
intro: Fagara minutiflora, also known as Zanthoxylum minutiflorum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. It is a shrub or small tree native to China, used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Fagara minutiflora include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and pneumonia. Fagara minutiflora is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, or used in combination with other herbs to make herbal remedies, including teas, tinctures, and ointments.
